headline: Improve Your Retirement Income with These 3 Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks
summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Accenture, Lowers Price Target to $280
summary: Mizuho  analyst Dan Dolev   maintains Accenture (NYSE:ACN) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $309 to $280.

raw.headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Accenture, Lowers Price Target to $280

headline: Insight Announces Jack Azagury, Former Accenture Chief Group Executive, as President and Chief Executive Officer
summary: CHANDLER, Ariz., March 23, 2026--Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ: NSIT) today announced that its Board of Directors has elected Jack Azagury to succeed Joyce Mullen as President and Chief Executive Officer, effective April 13, 2026. Mullen, who announced her retirement in October 2025, will continue with the company to assist Jack in an advisory role.

headline: Microsoft’s Expanding AI Security Partnerships Deepen Azure And Copilot Workflows
summary: Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) is expanding AI driven security and automation partnerships across its ecosystem, centered on Azure and Copilot. Recent agreements span cybersecurity and automation with Accenture and UiPath, enterprise planning with Lumel, and proposal automation with Expedience. Additional collaborations with DataBahn and Opsera focus on cloud data and DevOps optimization across major enterprise environments. These partnerships extend into mission critical and regulated sectors,...
